rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Jenny J Kim In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 23, 2017 line 1. PETITIONER JENNY KIM's Motion For Preliminary Injunction DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain her burden.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Hearing On Verified First Amended Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 23, 2017 line 1. PETITIONER JENNY KIM's Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator Continued to March 22, 2017. Parties to exchange the names of 3 proposed arbitrators by March 1, 2017. Parties are to agree on a mutually acceptable arbitrator and inform the Court of the selection by March 15, 2017. If the parties fail to agree on an arbitrator, each side shall submit the names of 3 proposed arbitrators by March 15, 2017 the Court. Moving party to submit a proposed order along with the submission of courtesy copy of March 15, 2017 filing. = (501/REQ)
